category_sources: source_facts.description says utilities to read, write, and manipulate files in ext2/3/4 filesystems; official site describes e2tools utilities for ext2/ext3 filesystems: https://e2tools.github.io/
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is e2tools; official site title and GitHub repository use e2tools: https://e2tools.github.io/
docs_sources: Official project site provides overview and links README usage examples; official GitHub README has quickstart documentation: https://e2tools.github.io/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/e2tools/e2tools; per instruction, repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify ext filesystem tools; official site lists e2cp, e2mv, e2rm, e2mkdir, e2ln, e2ls, and e2tail: https://e2tools.github.io/
